task_summary: SP21f attempted to center the mew-wisp cat terminal form, but stopped before product edits because the work session proposed an invalid mixed read/write batch and then replayed the same invalid action after retry guidance.
notes: The first attempt stopped before product edits with `write batch cannot mix read-only tools; use a separate read step before paired writes`. A retry with explicit steering to split read and write steps reused the same session and immediately replayed the same invalid pending action. No product diff was applied; `git status --short` showed only the pre-existing untracked `cat.png`. Issue #20 records the implementation-lane polish problem. The product work continued from fresh task #28/session #57.
